title: xQc suspended from Twitch after FIFA World Cup 2026 copyright claim explained
summary_full: Popular streamer xQc faced a temporary 48-hour suspension from Twitch after his channel received two copyright strikes. The action stemmed from a brief clip of FIFA World Cup 2026 match footage, reportedly around five seconds long and sourced from social media. This marks xQc's sixth suspension, highlighting ongoing debates about copyright enforcement on live-streaming platforms and the rapid dissemination of sports highlights.
